content.en:
Ye Tian no longer paid attention to the fusion of talents and the matter of constant light supernatural powers, but focused his eyes on the second treasure.

The second treasure was a charm, Ye Tian picked up the charm and looked at it, only then did he know the use of this charm.

"Immortal Charm!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This talisman is very awesome, that is, it will be maintained for a period of time, and it will be determined according to the cultivation, such as the master's extreme cultivation, which can remain immortal for a day, even if the Lord of the Yuan Gu makes a move on Ye Tian, once Ye Tian opens this spell, he cannot be killed within a day.

"What a terrible spell, if Harmon had this charm that day, I wouldn't have been able to kill him at all, and he had time to hide in the secret realm. "

Ye Tian said happily.

He put away the immortal charm and looked at the third treasure.

The third treasure was a sword stele, and Ye Tian felt the infinite rules of the sword path just by taking a slight look.

This sword tablet is definitely a treasure for kendo cultivators, but it is of little use to Ye Tian, it is impossible for him to cultivate another sword dao, it coincides with the sword dao, and it is useless.

"It can be used by Yue'er, this sword tablet is enough to make Yue'er's sword path quickly improve!"

Ye Tian also put away the sword monument with excitement.

The three treasures were taken away, and Ye Tian didn't continue to stay here.

Soon after.

Ye Tian came out of the secret realm!

In fact, he could have not come out and let the fourth deity help collect the innate light source, but if he wanted to collect such an innate origin thing, he must have a certain identity, and then he had to expose Ye Tian's identity.

He didn't want people to know that he had the talent of a deity, because there were not many people in the universe who had the ability to clone themselves, and most of the strong doppelgangers were very weak and had huge flaws.

If he has the same deity talent as the Mixed Yuan Supreme, maybe others will think that he has a talent like copying, and it will be completely troublesome.

Therefore, he still set out to collect the innate light source.

However, before collecting the innate light source, he had to go to another secret realm and take out the things in the last secret room, otherwise he would not feel at ease.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Terran territory, and after more than a day of hurrying, he finally came to a secret realm, and entered that secret realm through a similar method.

After that, he entered the core of the main hall, and it took him half a day to finally break through the barrier.

The treasures in the last secret room of this secret realm are different from the treasures in the last secret room on the earth, although they are the same three treasures, but they are three different treasures.

The three treasures here are the Void God Incense, once lit, it can be burned for a year, and within a year, it can improve the user's understanding by a thousand times, and can be used to comprehend the secret arts and exercises, which is a rare one-time treasure.

The second treasure is the Escape Talisman, once the Escape Talisman is activated, it will instantly escape from multiple star fields, which is one of the strongest charms to escape.

The third treasure is a black stone, called the Heaven Covering Stone, which can cover cause and effect and fate, unless it is a strong person in the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and is good at deduction or cause and effect, and the way of fate, it is impossible to calculate Ye Tian's heel and any information.

For Ye Tian, the Covering Stone is the biggest gain.

After obtaining these three treasures, Ye Tiancai returned to the Holy City of the Human Race.

Not long after, Ye Tian returned to the Holy City Heavenly Pavilion.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to contact the Kunwu Supreme.

I have to say that Kunwu Supreme has a very high status among the human race, and is very active, and often communicates with the supreme of other races, so to a certain extent, Kunwu Supreme has a wide range of knowledge and knows a lot of secrets.

He wanted to ask the Kunwu Supreme where in the universe or who had the innate light source in his hands.

......

Holy City Supreme Pavilion.

Ye Tian met with Kunwu Supreme here.

Now, Ye Tian has supreme-level combat power, and the Kunwu Supreme naturally attaches more importance to Ye Tian, almost treating Ye Tian as an existence of the same level, and naturally attaches more importance to Ye Tian's meeting.

"Ye Tian, I don't know what you want to do when you look for me this time?"

Kungo Supreme asked.

"Kunwu Supreme, I want an innate light source, do our human race have such an innate origin thing?"

Ye Tian asked.

"What, you want the Innate Origin Thing!!"

Kunwu Supreme was shocked.

In the realm of Heavenly Venerables, many Heavenly Venerables do not know the things of the Innate Origin, and even regard some things that contain the Origin as things of the Innate Origin, but only the Beings with extensive knowledge like them can truly know what the Innate Origin Things are.

"Ye Tian, do you know what the innate origin thing is?"

Kunwu Supreme said solemnly.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian briefly said the innate origin thing, even more than Kunwu Supreme Being.

Seeing that Ye Tian really understood the innate origin things, Kun Wu Supreme continued: "Ye Tian, the innate origin things are too rare, there are so many kinds of things in the entire universe, at most there are no more than the number of hands, and even some innate origin things are in legends, and it is not certain whether they exist or not. The innate light source is not too precious among the innate origin things, but it is also the innate origin thing, and its value is not low, even comparable to five or six pieces of supreme treasure. But even if someone else has an innate light source, you can't exchange it for five or six innate treasures. "

"Is it so precious?" Ye Tian frowned, "Is that the human race not?"

"No!" Kunwu Supreme assured: "I can guarantee that it is not, because human beings do not have the Dao of Light Supreme, if there is an innate light source, it will be traded long ago, and it is impossible to keep it in hand." The places in the universe that are most likely to have innate origin things are the Holy Light Clan and the Angel Clan, there are many cultivators of the Light Dao of these two races, and most of the supreme beings of the Holy Light Clan take the Light Dao, which is very compatible with the Origin of Light, and the Origin of Light is of the greatest use to them. As a result, these two races may have an innate light source. But even if they have an innate light source, if you want to trade from these two types to the innate light source, it is almost impossible, unless you destroy these two races. "

"Where else is it possible to have these two races?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know!" Kunwu Supreme shook his head, he was just a fourth-rank supreme, and he knew a limited number of secrets, so it was impossible to know everything.

Suddenly, Kunwu Supreme said, "Maybe there is a force with an innate light source!"

"Which force?"

Ye Tian's expression moved.

"Those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras!" Kun Wu Supreme said with a smile: "Those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Epochs must have traded or plundered a large number of treasures before the Great Destruction of the Universe, and in the previous Twelve Universe Eras, they may have given birth to an innate light source. However, you are only in charge of the realm, and you can't talk to them to trade, and I don't have any resources, even if I can have enough treasures to trade, I don't dare to go!"

Ye Tian nodded secretly, the supremes of the Twelve Universe Era are indeed too powerful, the weakest ones all have the combat power of the second-class supreme, and the Kunwu Supreme is only a fourth-class supreme, and he is not even the top among the fourth-class supremes, where can he dare to trade with those supremes of the twelve universe eras, in case the resources are robbed, it will really be for nothing.

"Kunwu Supreme, thank you, I'll figure it out myself!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Ye Tian, what do you want the innate light source for? You major in the Chaos Dao, although it includes the Dao of Light, there is no need to obtain the innate light source!" Kun Wu Supreme was extremely puzzled, so he asked.

"Kunwu Supreme, this is a secret, it's not convenient for me to say!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

"Well, then I won't ask!"

Kunwu Supreme also knew that everyone had some secrets, and he also had some secrets, and it was impossible to tell others, even if he had a good relationship with Ye Tian, there were some secrets that could not be said even if they could not be said.

Therefore, he didn't ask too many questions.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme separated.

Back in the Heavenly Pavilion, Ye Tian began to ponder alone.

As Kunwu Supreme said, the Holy Light Clan's and Angel Clan's desire for the innate light source is estimated to exceed everything, not to mention seven or eight Supreme Treasures, even if there are more Supreme Treasures, they will not be exchanged.

Moreover, even if these two clans have an innate light source, it is estimated that they have already used up their strength, and it is impossible to stay in their bodies forever.

It is better to trade the innate light source from the Holy Light Clan and the Angel Clan, than to obtain the innate light source from those supreme beings in the Twelve Universe Eras.

"If it is to trade with those supreme beings of the Twelve Universe Era, my body must not go, otherwise it will be very dangerous, but I can let the fourth deity go to trade, and I have the Heaven Covering Stone on my body now, even if the fourth deity appears in front of those supremes, they will not be able to deduce anything. It's a big deal, the fourth deity just abandons it!"

Ye Tian gritted his teeth and said.

This is undoubtedly a big gamble, after all, it is not easy to cultivate the fourth deity, it costs a lot of resources, and he attaches great importance to the fourth deity, if the fourth deity is sacrificed, it will definitely be a heavy loss.

If it weren't for the fact that he had just obtained a secret realm and was worth a lot of money, he would never have taken such an adventure.

But even if you let the fourth deity go, you can't go in the realm of domination, otherwise you won't even have the qualifications to talk on an equal footing.

"Then let the fourth deity go to the Tianzun realm recently!"

Ye Tian decided.
